# Validation Report

Save under `docs/validation/<date>-<type>-<scope>.md`.

Types: `crosscheck`, `walkthrough`, `signoff`, `peer-review`, `changeset`.

## Metadata

- Date:
- Type:
- Scope:
- Owner (BA):
- Status: draft | review | agreed

## Method

How the validation was performed. Examples:

- Manual cross-check using `docs/QUALITY_GATES.md` checklist for SRS DoR.
- Stakeholder walkthrough with STK-007, 60 min, recorded.
- Peer review by `<role>`.
- Sign-off meeting with sponsor.

## Artifacts In Scope

| Artifact | ID | Version / Date | Status entering | Status leaving |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

## Findings

| ID | Finding | Severity (block / major / minor / info) | Affected artifact | Resolution | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| F-1 |  |  |  |  |  |

## Sign-Off (if applicable)

- Signing role:
- Signing person:
- Date:
- Scope statement (what is being signed off):
- Conditions / caveats:

## Traceability Impact

Rows updated in `docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md`:

- REQ-XXX moved <status> -> <status>.

## Follow-Up

- Action.

## History

- YYYY-MM-DD: created.
